|} |- | colspan="13" style="font-size:125%;line-height:1;"|Green: ideal, Yellow: under half full, Red: orphan<br /><br />Number of pictures on last row of gallery<br />with c columns (browser-dependent)<br />and p pictures (editor can control)<br /><br />i.e. good number of pictures to have in a gallery:<br />1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 18, 20, ... |}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{no documentation}} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} </noinclude> <!-- #!/usr/bin/env python
n_pic_max = 60 n_col_max = 12 colour_ideal = '0f0' colour_under_half = 'ff0' colour_orphan = 'f99' colour_one_row = 'cff' colour_default = 'fff'
import re def fmt(string): ## string.format(**vars()) using tags {expression!format} by CMG Lee def f(tag): i_sep = tag.rfind('!'); return (re.sub('\.0+$', '', str(eval(tag[1:-1]))) if (i_sep < 0) else ('{:%s}' % tag[i_sep + 1:-1]).format(eval(tag[1:i_sep]))) return (re.sub(r'(?<!{){[^{}]+}', lambda m:f(m.group()), string) .replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')) def append(obj, string): return obj.append(fmt(string)) def tabbify(cellss, separator='|'): cellpadss = [list(rows) + [''] * (len(max(cellss, key=len)) - len(rows)) for rows in cellss] fmts = ['%%%ds' % (max([len(str(cell)) for cell in cols])) for cols in zip(*cellpadss)] return '\n'.join([separator.join(fmts) % tuple(rows) for rows in cellpadss]) def hex_rgb(colour): ## convert [#]RGB to #RRGGBB and [#]RRGGBB to #RRGGBB return '#%s' % (colour if len(colour) > 4 else ''.join([c * 2 for c in colour])).lstrip('#')
out_ths = ['!!%d' % (n_col) for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1)] out_trs = [] for n_pic in range(1, n_pic_max + 1): has_orphan = False out_tds = [] for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1): remainder = n_pic % n_col colour = colour_ideal if (remainder == 0) else ( colour_one_row if (n_pic < n_col) else ( colour_orphan if (remainder == 1) else ( colour_under_half if (remainder * 2 < n_col) else colour_default ))) if (remainder == 1 and (n_pic != n_col + 1) and n_pic > 1): has_orphan = True append(out_tds, '''bgcolor="{hex_rgb(colour)}"|{remainder}''') append (out_trs, '''|- style="{'color:#999999' if (has_orphan) else 'font-weight:bold'};" !{n_pic} |{'||'.join(out_tds)}''') out = fmt('''{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:75%;line-height:0.5;text-align:center;float:right;margin-left:1ex;" !{{{{diagonal split header|p|c}}}}{''.join(out_ths)} {'\\n'.join(out_trs)} |}''') print(out) -->

|} |- | colspan="13" style="font-size:125%;line-height:1;"|Green: ideal, Yellow: under half full, Red: orphan<br /><br />Number of pictures on last row of gallery<br />with c columns (browser-dependent)<br />and p pictures (editor can control)<br /><br />i.e. good number of pictures to have in a gallery:<br />1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 18, 20, ... |}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{no documentation}} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} </noinclude> <!-- #!/usr/bin/env python
n_pic_max = 60 n_col_max = 12 colour_ideal = '0f0' colour_under_half = 'ff0' colour_orphan = 'f99' colour_one_row = 'cff' colour_default = 'fff'
import re def fmt(string): ## string.format(**vars()) using tags {expression!format} by CMG Lee def f(tag): i_sep = tag.rfind('!'); return (re.sub('\.0+$', '', str(eval(tag[1:-1]))) if (i_sep < 0) else ('{:%s}' % tag[i_sep + 1:-1]).format(eval(tag[1:i_sep]))) return (re.sub(r'(?<!{){[^{}]+}', lambda m:f(m.group()), string) .replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')) def append(obj, string): return obj.append(fmt(string)) def tabbify(cellss, separator='|'): cellpadss = [list(rows) + [''] * (len(max(cellss, key=len)) - len(rows)) for rows in cellss] fmts = ['%%%ds' % (max([len(str(cell)) for cell in cols])) for cols in zip(*cellpadss)] return '\n'.join([separator.join(fmts) % tuple(rows) for rows in cellpadss]) def hex_rgb(colour): ## convert [#]RGB to #RRGGBB and [#]RRGGBB to #RRGGBB return '#%s' % (colour if len(colour) > 4 else ''.join([c * 2 for c in colour])).lstrip('#')
out_ths = ['!!%d' % (n_col) for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1)] out_trs = [] for n_pic in range(1, n_pic_max + 1): has_orphan = False out_tds = [] for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1): remainder = n_pic % n_col colour = colour_ideal if (remainder == 0) else ( colour_one_row if (n_pic < n_col) else ( colour_orphan if (remainder == 1) else ( colour_under_half if (remainder * 2 < n_col) else colour_default ))) if (remainder == 1 and (n_pic != n_col + 1) and n_pic > 1): has_orphan = True append(out_tds, '''bgcolor="{hex_rgb(colour)}"|{remainder}''') append (out_trs, '''|- style="{'color:#999999' if (has_orphan) else 'font-weight:bold'};" !{n_pic} |{'||'.join(out_tds)}''') out = fmt('''{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:75%;line-height:0.5;text-align:center;float:right;margin-left:1ex;" !{{{{diagonal split header|p|c}}}}{''.join(out_ths)} {'\\n'.join(out_trs)} |}''') print(out) --> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

|} |- | colspan="13" style="font-size:125%;line-height:1;"|Green: ideal, Yellow: under half full, Red: orphan<br /><br />Number of pictures on last row of gallery<br />with c columns (browser-dependent)<br />and p pictures (editor can control)<br /><br />i.e. good number of pictures to have in a gallery:<br />1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 18, 20, ... |}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{no documentation}} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} </noinclude> <!-- #!/usr/bin/env python
n_pic_max = 60 n_col_max = 12 colour_ideal = '0f0' colour_under_half = 'ff0' colour_orphan = 'f99' colour_one_row = 'cff' colour_default = 'fff'
import re def fmt(string): ## string.format(**vars()) using tags {expression!format} by CMG Lee def f(tag): i_sep = tag.rfind('!'); return (re.sub('\.0+$', '', str(eval(tag[1:-1]))) if (i_sep < 0) else ('{:%s}' % tag[i_sep + 1:-1]).format(eval(tag[1:i_sep]))) return (re.sub(r'(?<!{){[^{}]+}', lambda m:f(m.group()), string) .replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')) def append(obj, string): return obj.append(fmt(string)) def tabbify(cellss, separator='|'): cellpadss = [list(rows) + [''] * (len(max(cellss, key=len)) - len(rows)) for rows in cellss] fmts = ['%%%ds' % (max([len(str(cell)) for cell in cols])) for cols in zip(*cellpadss)] return '\n'.join([separator.join(fmts) % tuple(rows) for rows in cellpadss]) def hex_rgb(colour): ## convert [#]RGB to #RRGGBB and [#]RRGGBB to #RRGGBB return '#%s' % (colour if len(colour) > 4 else ''.join([c * 2 for c in colour])).lstrip('#')
out_ths = ['!!%d' % (n_col) for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1)] out_trs = [] for n_pic in range(1, n_pic_max + 1): has_orphan = False out_tds = [] for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1): remainder = n_pic % n_col colour = colour_ideal if (remainder == 0) else ( colour_one_row if (n_pic < n_col) else ( colour_orphan if (remainder == 1) else ( colour_under_half if (remainder * 2 < n_col) else colour_default ))) if (remainder == 1 and (n_pic != n_col + 1) and n_pic > 1): has_orphan = True append(out_tds, '''bgcolor="{hex_rgb(colour)}"|{remainder}''') append (out_trs, '''|- style="{'color:#999999' if (has_orphan) else 'font-weight:bold'};" !{n_pic} |{'||'.join(out_tds)}''') out = fmt('''{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:75%;line-height:0.5;text-align:center;float:right;margin-left:1ex;" !{{{{diagonal split header|p|c}}}}{''.join(out_ths)} {'\\n'.join(out_trs)} |}''') print(out) -->

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

|} |- | colspan="13" style="font-size:125%;line-height:1;"|Green: ideal, Yellow: under half full, Red: orphan<br /><br />Number of pictures on last row of gallery<br />with c columns (browser-dependent)<br />and p pictures (editor can control)<br /><br />i.e. good number of pictures to have in a gallery:<br />1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 18, 20, ... |}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{no documentation}} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} </noinclude> <!-- #!/usr/bin/env python
n_pic_max = 60 n_col_max = 12 colour_ideal = '0f0' colour_under_half = 'ff0' colour_orphan = 'f99' colour_one_row = 'cff' colour_default = 'fff'
import re def fmt(string): ## string.format(**vars()) using tags {expression!format} by CMG Lee def f(tag): i_sep = tag.rfind('!'); return (re.sub('\.0+$', '', str(eval(tag[1:-1]))) if (i_sep < 0) else ('{:%s}' % tag[i_sep + 1:-1]).format(eval(tag[1:i_sep]))) return (re.sub(r'(?<!{){[^{}]+}', lambda m:f(m.group()), string) .replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')) def append(obj, string): return obj.append(fmt(string)) def tabbify(cellss, separator='|'): cellpadss = [list(rows) + [''] * (len(max(cellss, key=len)) - len(rows)) for rows in cellss] fmts = ['%%%ds' % (max([len(str(cell)) for cell in cols])) for cols in zip(*cellpadss)] return '\n'.join([separator.join(fmts) % tuple(rows) for rows in cellpadss]) def hex_rgb(colour): ## convert [#]RGB to #RRGGBB and [#]RRGGBB to #RRGGBB return '#%s' % (colour if len(colour) > 4 else ''.join([c * 2 for c in colour])).lstrip('#')
out_ths = ['!!%d' % (n_col) for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1)] out_trs = [] for n_pic in range(1, n_pic_max + 1): has_orphan = False out_tds = [] for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1): remainder = n_pic % n_col colour = colour_ideal if (remainder == 0) else ( colour_one_row if (n_pic < n_col) else ( colour_orphan if (remainder == 1) else ( colour_under_half if (remainder * 2 < n_col) else colour_default ))) if (remainder == 1 and (n_pic != n_col + 1) and n_pic > 1): has_orphan = True append(out_tds, '''bgcolor="{hex_rgb(colour)}"|{remainder}''') append (out_trs, '''|- style="{'color:#999999' if (has_orphan) else 'font-weight:bold'};" !{n_pic} |{'||'.join(out_tds)}''') out = fmt('''{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:75%;line-height:0.5;text-align:center;float:right;margin-left:1ex;" !{{{{diagonal split header|p|c}}}}{''.join(out_ths)} {'\\n'.join(out_trs)} |}''') print(out) --> [[Category:Templates]]

|} |- | colspan="13" style="font-size:125%;line-height:1;"|Green: ideal, Yellow: under half full, Red: orphan<br /><br />Number of pictures on last row of gallery<br />with c columns (browser-dependent)<br />and p pictures (editor can control)<br /><br />i.e. good number of pictures to have in a gallery:<br />1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 18, 20, ... |}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{no documentation}} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} </noinclude> <!-- #!/usr/bin/env python
n_pic_max = 60 n_col_max = 12 colour_ideal = '0f0' colour_under_half = 'ff0' colour_orphan = 'f99' colour_one_row = 'cff' colour_default = 'fff'
import re def fmt(string): ## string.format(**vars()) using tags {expression!format} by CMG Lee def f(tag): i_sep = tag.rfind('!'); return (re.sub('\.0+$', '', str(eval(tag[1:-1]))) if (i_sep < 0) else ('{:%s}' % tag[i_sep + 1:-1]).format(eval(tag[1:i_sep]))) return (re.sub(r'(?<!{){[^{}]+}', lambda m:f(m.group()), string) .replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')) def append(obj, string): return obj.append(fmt(string)) def tabbify(cellss, separator='|'): cellpadss = [list(rows) + [''] * (len(max(cellss, key=len)) - len(rows)) for rows in cellss] fmts = ['%%%ds' % (max([len(str(cell)) for cell in cols])) for cols in zip(*cellpadss)] return '\n'.join([separator.join(fmts) % tuple(rows) for rows in cellpadss]) def hex_rgb(colour): ## convert [#]RGB to #RRGGBB and [#]RRGGBB to #RRGGBB return '#%s' % (colour if len(colour) > 4 else ''.join([c * 2 for c in colour])).lstrip('#')
out_ths = ['!!%d' % (n_col) for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1)] out_trs = [] for n_pic in range(1, n_pic_max + 1): has_orphan = False out_tds = [] for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1): remainder = n_pic % n_col colour = colour_ideal if (remainder == 0) else ( colour_one_row if (n_pic < n_col) else ( colour_orphan if (remainder == 1) else ( colour_under_half if (remainder * 2 < n_col) else colour_default ))) if (remainder == 1 and (n_pic != n_col + 1) and n_pic > 1): has_orphan = True append(out_tds, '''bgcolor="{hex_rgb(colour)}"|{remainder}''') append (out_trs, '''|- style="{'color:#999999' if (has_orphan) else 'font-weight:bold'};" !{n_pic} |{'||'.join(out_tds)}''') out = fmt('''{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:75%;line-height:0.5;text-align:center;float:right;margin-left:1ex;" !{{{{diagonal split header|p|c}}}}{''.join(out_ths)} {'\\n'.join(out_trs)} |}''') print(out) --> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

|} |- | colspan="13" style="font-size:125%;line-height:1;"|Green: ideal, Yellow: under half full, Red: orphan<br /><br />Number of pictures on last row of gallery<br />with c columns (browser-dependent)<br />and p pictures (editor can control)<br /><br />i.e. good number of pictures to have in a gallery:<br />1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 18, 20, ... |}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{no documentation}} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} </noinclude> <!-- #!/usr/bin/env python
n_pic_max = 60 n_col_max = 12 colour_ideal = '0f0' colour_under_half = 'ff0' colour_orphan = 'f99' colour_one_row = 'cff' colour_default = 'fff'
import re def fmt(string): ## string.format(**vars()) using tags {expression!format} by CMG Lee def f(tag): i_sep = tag.rfind('!'); return (re.sub('\.0+$', '', str(eval(tag[1:-1]))) if (i_sep < 0) else ('{:%s}' % tag[i_sep + 1:-1]).format(eval(tag[1:i_sep]))) return (re.sub(r'(?<!{){[^{}]+}', lambda m:f(m.group()), string) .replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')) def append(obj, string): return obj.append(fmt(string)) def tabbify(cellss, separator='|'): cellpadss = [list(rows) + [''] * (len(max(cellss, key=len)) - len(rows)) for rows in cellss] fmts = ['%%%ds' % (max([len(str(cell)) for cell in cols])) for cols in zip(*cellpadss)] return '\n'.join([separator.join(fmts) % tuple(rows) for rows in cellpadss]) def hex_rgb(colour): ## convert [#]RGB to #RRGGBB and [#]RRGGBB to #RRGGBB return '#%s' % (colour if len(colour) > 4 else ''.join([c * 2 for c in colour])).lstrip('#')
out_ths = ['!!%d' % (n_col) for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1)] out_trs = [] for n_pic in range(1, n_pic_max + 1): has_orphan = False out_tds = [] for n_col in range(1, n_col_max + 1): remainder = n_pic % n_col colour = colour_ideal if (remainder == 0) else ( colour_one_row if (n_pic < n_col) else ( colour_orphan if (remainder == 1) else ( colour_under_half if (remainder * 2 < n_col) else colour_default ))) if (remainder == 1 and (n_pic != n_col + 1) and n_pic > 1): has_orphan = True append(out_tds, '''bgcolor="{hex_rgb(colour)}"|{remainder}''') append (out_trs, '''|- style="{'color:#999999' if (has_orphan) else 'font-weight:bold'};" !{n_pic} |{'||'.join(out_tds)}''') out = fmt('''{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:75%;line-height:0.5;text-align:center;float:right;margin-left:1ex;" !{{{{diagonal split header|p|c}}}}{''.join(out_ths)} {'\\n'.join(out_trs)} |}''') print(out) --> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
